title: EQ - Two devices on one phone, change EQ on one device has no effect on the second device
scenario: Changing EQ preset on one paired device does not affect EQ settings on the second paired device.
steps: Pair two devices (e.g., headphones and earbuds) to the same phone.
Open the companion app or settings for the first device.
Change the EQ preset on the first device to a different setting.
Check the EQ settings on the second device.
expected: Changing the EQ preset on one device should also update the EQ settings on the second device.
